name: vscode-copilot-chat-bridge
description: Expose VS Code's Copilot Chat (language model API + chat UI commands) over a local HTTP bridge so MCP clients can drive it.

commands.title: Copilot Chat Bridge: List chat models

copilotChatBridge.port.description: Loopback TCP port used by the bridge HTTP server.

copilotChatBridge.defaultVendor.description: Default LanguageModelChat vendor used when /api/ask receives no explicit selector.

copilotChatBridge.defaultFamily.description: Default LanguageModelChat family used when /api/ask receives no explicit selector. Empty means 'any'.

copilotChatBridge.requestTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time to wait for a language model response, in milliseconds (capped at 600000).
